name: avoid_sector_inflow_without_regime_confirmation
warning: Do not use sector_inflow signal without confirming a risk-on regime with historical accuracy above 69%
reason: sector_inflow accuracy is 0% over 2 samples in the current window; backtested data shows strong performance only in 위험선호 and 위험회피 regimes with large sample counts
regime_context: 혼조 (미국 위험선호 표면 / 한국 위험회피 심화)
